site.name: CAREMAP
site.description: Find clinics for cosmetic, dermatology, dental, ophthalmology and Korean medicine all in one place.
site.footerTagline: Find Korea's clinics, dentists, Korean medicine and aesthetic centers in one place. Compare and call directly for non-covered treatments.
site.dataSource: Data source: HIRA (Health Insurance Review & Assessment Service) Korea Public Data Portal
site.legal: This service is operated under Article 56 of the Korean Medical Service Act and does not replace medical consultation or diagnosis.

home.lede: Clinics for plastic surgery, dermatology, dental, ophthalmology and Korean medicine. Search by region and specialty, then call directly for inquiries.
home.specialtiesSub: Start with cosmetic and out-of-pocket treatments.
home.recommendSub: Primary care: clinics, dental & Korean medicine

search.title: Clinic Search
search.emptyDesc: Try different keywords — clinic name, region or specialty.

hospital.introTemplate: {name} is a {kind} located in {region}.{est} A total of {drCount} medical staff work there.
hospital.staffNote: * Individual doctor profiles are not included in HIRA data.
hospital.hoursNote: * Opening hours will be available after activation of the HIRA detailed information service. Please contact the clinic directly for exact hours.
hospital.callMeta: Please contact the clinic to confirm availability.
hospital.externalMapsDesc: Check ratings and reviews on the map services below. Provided via legitimate external links.
hospital.metaDescription: {name} ({kind}) — located in {region}, phone {tel}, {drCount} doctors. Hours, location and contact information.

region.intro: Information for {count} clinics, dentists and Korean medicine in {sido}, organized by district. Select a district to browse.

sigungu.intro: Information for {count} clinics in {sido} {sggu}. Select a specialty above or browse the list below.

category.intro: Information for {count} {specialty} clinics in {sido} {sggu}. Check the location, phone and medical staff and call the nearest clinic directly. All data comes from HIRA-verified medical institutions of the Korean public data portal.
category.noResults: No clinics found for this criteria.

notFound.title: Clinic not found
notFound.description: The URL is invalid or this clinic is not in our database.
